subcodes.first_line: O Sadiq! Hearken unto the Call, for verily it guideth thee and draweth thee nigh, and causeth thee to hear that which hath been raised from this most exalted Station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا صادق اسمع الندآء انه یهدیک و یقربک و یسمعک ما ارتفع من هذا المقام الاعلی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @nearness and remoteness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
